raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 715 aims to strengthen protections for K–12 students against antisemitism and discrimination.",
    "The bill is a product of collaboration between the California Legislative Diversity Caucuses.",
    "AB 715 seeks to address increased incidents of antisemitism in K–12 education.",
    "The legislation intends to foster safe and supportive schools for all students.",
    "AB 715 enhances the Uniform Complaint Process (UCP) for addressing discrimination.",
    "The bill increases accountability for local educational agencies regarding discrimination.",
    "AB 715 creates a state-level Antisemitism Coordinator.",
    "The legislation ensures full K–12 compliance with laws preventing discrimination.",
    "AB 715 strengthens anti-discrimination protections related to nationality and religion.",
    "The measure aims to provide enhanced protections and better resources for students facing discrimination.",
    "There has been an alarming increase in antisemitism in schools across California, particularly since the October 7 Massacre."
  ]
}
```
